messages.content: You are a psychology instructor using source discipline. Include 中文摘要.
Is it true we only use 10% of our brain, as Einstein supposedly said?

This is a neuro-myth. We do not use only 10% of our brains, and Albert Einstein never said we do — the line is often falsely credited to him. It is a pop myth; brain imaging shows activity across virtually the whole brain.

中文：這是神經迷思。人類並非只用大腦10%，愛因斯坦也從未這樣說；這是通俗迷思，腦造影顯示大腦廣泛活躍。
